case_title: MARY ELIZABETH INN VS. GABRIELE YORK ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARY ELIZABETH INN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YORK, GABRIELE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1040 BUSH STREET # 211, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 70271751)
DECLARATION OF H OLSEN IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT (TRANSACTION ID # 70271751) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARY ELIZABETH INN
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 70271751) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT YORK, GABRIELE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE (TRANSACTION ID # 70271751) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARY ELIZABETH INN
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT YORK, GABRIELE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARY ELIZABETH INN AS TO DEFENDANT YORK, GABRIELE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (NO RENT DUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARY ELIZABETH INN AS TO DEFENDANT YORK, GABRIELE DOES 1 TO 10
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 70271751) AS TO DEFENDANT YORK, GABRIELE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 70236655) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARY ELIZABETH INN SERVED JUN-16-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YORK, GABRIELE
